nodes.name: 📥 Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: URL to paste in session settings: copy from n8n after activating

nodes.name: ✅ Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge immediately so the server does not retry the request.

nodes.name: 🔍 Extract Message Fields
nodes.notes: Normalises the payload and maps wppconnect types to clean categories.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Message Type
nodes.notes: Routes to the correct handler based on incoming message type.

nodes.name: 💬 Handle Text
nodes.notes: Keyword-based auto-reply. Customise the conditions freely.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Handle Image
nodes.notes: Processes received images. Change replyType to 'image' and set replyImageUrl to send an image back.

nodes.name: 🎵 Handle Audio / Voice
nodes.notes: Handles audio files and voice notes. Change replyType to 'audio' and set replyAudioUrl to reply with audio.

nodes.name: 📄 Handle Document
nodes.notes: Handles PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ZIP and other document types. Change replyType to 'document' to reply with a file.

nodes.name: 🔗 Merge All Replies
nodes.notes: Single merge point. All 5 type handlers connect here.

nodes.name: ⏱️ Wait 2 Seconds
nodes.notes: 2-second delay to avoid being flagged as a bot by WhatsApp.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Reply Type
nodes.notes: Routes the reply to the correct sender based on replyType field set by the handler.

nodes.name: 📤 Send Text Reply
nodes.notes: Sends a text reply. Credential: HTTP Header Auth — Name: X-API-Key, Value: your API key.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Send Image Reply
nodes.notes: Sends an image reply. Set replyImageUrl (public URL) and optionally replyCaption in the handler.

nodes.name: 🎵 Send Audio Reply
nodes.notes: Sends an audio file reply. Set replyAudioUrl (public URL) in the handler.

nodes.name: 📄 Send Document Reply
nodes.notes: Sends a document reply. Set replyFileUrl, replyFileName, and optionally replyCaption in the handler.
